notes: Stock UT99 (bymatej/ut99-server: original 436 + Epic bonus packs, no third-party mods). Same two-transport control as the modded build — GameSpy reads on the query port (game port + 1), UWeb admin-console writes on 5580 (HTTP Basic auth) — verified live: `servertravel`, `say`, bot commands and the console all work. Runs genuinely stock: `rules` reports mutators=None and only Botpack gametypes are available (no MonsterHunt/ChaosUT/BunnyTrack), so change_gametype is limited to stock classes and there is no `modData` catalogue. The map-change verb is `servertravel`, not `switchlevel`. The query port exposes no IPs.

commands.name: change_map
commands.description: Load a map, keeping the current game type. Map prefix must match the running type (CTF-* in CTF, DM-* in DeathMatch).

map.description: Map name without extension, e.g. CTF-Face or DM-Deck16][

commands.name: change_gametype
commands.description: Load a map AND switch the game type. Stock Botpack gametypes only — this build ships no mod gametypes.

map.description: Map name without extension, e.g. DM-Deck16][

gametype.description: Stock game type class: Botpack.CTFGame (CTF), Botpack.DeathMatchPlus (DM), Botpack.TeamGamePlus (Team DM), Botpack.Domination, Botpack.Assault, Botpack.LastManStanding.

player.description: Exact player name as shown by the players query.

commands.name: add_bots
commands.description: Add bots to the current match.

commands.name: remove_bots
commands.description: Remove all bots from the current match.

commands.name: say
commands.description: Broadcast an admin message to everyone on the server (shown as 'Admin: <message>').

commands.name: pause
commands.description: Toggle pause on the current match.

queries.name: server_info
queries.description: Server name, current map, game type and player count, from the GameSpy \info\ query.

queries.name: rules
queries.description: Match settings from the GameSpy \rules\ query. On this stock build `mutators` is normally None.

queries.name: players
queries.description: Human players (name, score, ping, team) from the GameSpy \players\ query. Bots do NOT appear, and a player drops from the list while dead/respawning. The query port exposes no IPs.
